automation_notes: Automated strategies can be used in the Trading Combine and Funded Accounts. TopstepX API available ($29/mo). No VPS/VPN usage allowed - must trade from personal device. No HFT. Topstep provides zero support for automation troubleshooting.

50000.daily_loss_limit_notes: No mandatory daily loss limit during the Trading Combine. A personal daily loss limit feature is available optionally via TopstepX settings; breaching it suspends trading for the remainder of the session but does NOT fail or reset the account.
50000.drawdown_notes: EOD trailing during evaluation — trailing high-water mark is only updated at end of each trading day, not intraday. Switches to intraday trailing drawdown after funding.
50000.contract_limit_progression: May increase in Express Funded Account after profit milestones; verify current limits at help.topstep.com
50000.consistency_rule_description: No single day can exceed 50% of the profit target (e.g., max $1,500/day for a $50K account with a $3,000 target)

100000.daily_loss_limit_notes: No mandatory daily loss limit during the Trading Combine. A personal daily loss limit feature is available optionally via TopstepX settings; breaching it suspends trading for the remainder of the session but does NOT fail or reset the account.
100000.drawdown_notes: EOD trailing during evaluation — trailing high-water mark is only updated at end of each trading day, not intraday. Switches to intraday trailing drawdown after funding.
100000.contract_limit_progression: May increase in Express Funded Account after profit milestones; verify current limits at help.topstep.com
100000.consistency_rule_description: No single day can exceed 50% of the profit target (e.g., max $3,000/day for a $100K account with a $6,000 target)

150000.daily_loss_limit_notes: No mandatory daily loss limit during the Trading Combine. A personal daily loss limit feature is available optionally via TopstepX settings; breaching it suspends trading for the remainder of the session but does NOT fail or reset the account.
150000.drawdown_notes: EOD trailing during evaluation — trailing high-water mark is only updated at end of each trading day, not intraday. Switches to intraday trailing drawdown after funding.
150000.contract_limit_progression: May increase in Express Funded Account after profit milestones; verify current limits at help.topstep.com
150000.consistency_rule_description: No single day can exceed 50% of the profit target (e.g., max $4,500/day for a $150K account with a $9,000 target)

payout_structure.first_payout_bonus_description: The 100% first-$10K bonus was discontinued for accounts opened after January 12, 2026. Traders who joined before that date retain it (grandfathered). All new traders receive the standard 90/10 split from day one.
payout_structure.payout_frequency: On request; minimum 5 Benchmark Trading Days since last payout
payout_structure.payout_frequency_notes: A Benchmark Trading Day = a market day where you actively trade and earn at least $150 in profits. For the first 30 Benchmark Trading Days, payouts are limited to 50% of your 90% share. After 30 Benchmark Trading Days, you may request 100% of your 90% share.

scaling_requirements.details: Can request account scaling after demonstrating consistent profitability

key_differentiator: Most established prop firm (2012), best education and coaching, TopstepX API for automation
pros: Payouts on request after 5 Benchmark Trading Days
cons: Switches to intraday trailing drawdown after funding
VPS/VPN not allowed (must trade from personal device)
First-$10K 100% payout bonus discontinued for accounts opened after January 12, 2026
notes: Topstep is the gold standard for education-focused prop trading. Automation is explicitly allowed and they provide an API (TopstepX). VPS/VPN strictly prohibited — all trading must originate from a personal device. The 100% first-$10K payout bonus was grandfathered out for new accounts after January 12, 2026.
